brief: 制作 PDF 生成员工包。上传 .pdf → 读取原生文字/分页结构 → 输出结构化 JSON（document_parsed.json）作为中介 → 写入 outputs/generated_document.pdf；可选用 agent 润色。handlers 含 direct_python 与 agent。
requirements: handlers must include "direct_python"; may include "agent" for optional polish.
Parse PDF into JSON or build from user_query/.txt; write generated_document.pdf from JSON.
Never fabricate content when inputs/ is empty.
Return {ok, summary, items, warnings, error, meta}.
